evals.expected_output: langs.json is produced with detected languages (CLD3) and declared language signals including hreflang alternates.

assertions.description: langs.json is created with detected, declared, and reconciliation sections.

evals.prompt: Run a language audit on https://www.adobe.com to check for undeclared languages
evals.expected_output: langs.json is produced and any languages detected in the body that are not declared via hreflang or html@lang are listed in reconciliation.detectedNotDeclared.

assertions.description: langs.json is created and includes a reconciliation section.

evals.expected_output: langs.json reports French as the primary detected language and the html@lang declaration matches.

assertions.description: langs.json is created with language detection results.
